gist.headline: PezzAI joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: PezzAI just landed in the community showcase. It's a free suite of AI tools built and funded by a single dev, which is exactly the kind of indie energy we love to see.
gist.summary: Added PezzAI, an indie-developed suite of free AI tools, to the community app directory.
gist.impact: The community showcase grows by one more indie project, making it easier for users to discover PezzAI's chat tools.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee watering a new seedling in the greenhouse. Emphasize the solo-dev/indie nature with a cozy, small-scale gardening vibe, representing a new app taking root in the ecosystem.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, carefully watering a new glowing seedling in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. A chunky retro computer monitor in the background displays a chat interface. Soft lavender and peach pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
